news_items.headline: Shaikin: As MLB proposes salary cap, Sacramento pursues team it might not be able to afford
news_items.summary: Sacramento wants Major League Baseball to stick around after the Athletics leave town, but a $4-billion price tag for an expansion team might be too much.

news_items.headline: Mets' Jorge Polanco talks potential timeline to return from rehab assignment
news_items.summary: Mets DH/1B Jorge Polanco spoke to the media from the Binghamton Rumble Ponies dugout to talk about his rehab and a potential timeline for his return to the big leagues.

news_items.headline: Ronald Acuña Jr. grand slam powers 10-2 win as Braves win another series over Boston
news_items.summary: We, the spoiled denizens of Braves Country, have made our displeasure known about the recent offensive outages. Some of it warranted (dropping a series to the Nats at home). We may have said things we regret. I’m taking your Ronald Acuña Jr. apology forms riiight here. The Braves will finish 4-2 against the Red Sox […]

news_items.headline: Sacramento officials reveal campaign for MLB expansion team: What we know
news_items.summary: Will there be MLB in Sacramento permanently? West coast leaders share ambitious plans for MLB expansion.

news_items.headline: Astros vs. Rangers Game Thread: Game 58, 5/28/2026
news_items.summary: TONIGHT’S GAME: Tonight, the Houston Astros (25-32) and Texas Rangers (25-30) will play the finale of this 4-game series at Globe Life Field in Arlington, TX. RHP Spencer Arrighetti (6-1, 1.32 ERA) will start for the Astros vs. RHP Nathan Eovaldi (5-5, 3.55 ERA). Tonight will be Arrighetti’s 1st career appearance at Globe Life Field […]
